node.title: Working with Brushes - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.description: NinjaTrader used two different APIs for rending UI components, depending on the performance required. This often caused confusion between the types of .NET objects used for certain tasks, and also required a little bit of guidance to help developers understand some of the multi-threaded implications of using certain types across the life cycle of each object.

node.title: Using SharpDX for Custom Chart Rendering - NinjaTrader 8 Help Guide
node.description: NinjaTrader 8 Charts used a .NET Library called SharpDX that worked with the native Microsoft DirectX API. This was a major overhaul from the previously used GDI namespace and in efforts to help provide better for support for custom chart rendering, I was tasked with designing a tutorial to help users understand the new information that came along with the updated requirements.
